# API Reference

## Functions

### add(a, b)

Returns the sum of two numbers.

### multiply(a, b)

Returns the product of two numbers.

### factorial(n)

Computes the factorial of a non-negative integer using an iterative approach.
Throws an error if the input is negative.

### isPalindrome(str)

Checks whether a string is a palindrome, ignoring case and special characters.

## Classes

### MathHelper

A stateful helper that tracks computation history.

#### Methods

- `addWithHistory(a, b)` — Adds two numbers and records the result
- `getHistory()` — Returns all previously computed results
- `clear()` — Resets the computation history
